llm_score_rationale: Negative adjustment because the claims are broadly reasonable as methodological points but fail to answer the objective materially and are poorly supported by the cited excerpts. The objective asks whether a U.S. fintech can use AI to generate customer-facing loan explanations and adverse-action notices and what regulatory/liability risks arise if they are inaccurate; the claims mostly state meta-research principles rather than providing substantive legal conclusions about ECOA/Reg B, FCRA/Reg V
